CapCut

On this page

Xcode ​

Apple's IDE for Mac and iOS development

General ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+NNew File
Cmd+Shift+NNew Project
Cmd+OOpen
Cmd+SSave
Cmd+Shift+SSave All
Cmd+WClose
Cmd+QQuit
Cmd+,Preferences
Cmd+Opt+CProperties

Editing ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+ZUndo
Cmd+Shift+ZRedo
Cmd+CCopy
Cmd+VPaste
Cmd+XCut
Cmd+DDuplicate
Cmd+/Comment
Cmd+Alt+/Documentation
Cmd+Shift+ReturnComplete
Ctrl+.Next Completion
TabAccept Completion
EscShow Completions

Navigation ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+Shift+OOpen Quickly
Cmd+Opt+OOpen Quickly (Header)
Cmd+LGo to Line
Cmd+Opt+LeftNavigate Back
Cmd+Opt+RightNavigate Forward
Cmd+JFilter in Navigator
Cmd+Shift+JShow in Finder
F5Navigate Forward
Shift+F5Navigate Back
Cmd+Opt+]Next Issue
Cmd+Opt+[Previous Issue

Search ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+FFind
Cmd+Shift+FFind in Project
Cmd+GFind Next
Cmd+Shift+GFind Previous
Cmd+Alt+FFind and Replace
Cmd+Alt+Shift+FFind and Replace in Project

Selection ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+ASelect All
Cmd+Shift+LeftSelect to Line Start
Cmd+Shift+RightSelect to Line End
Cmd+Opt+Shift+LeftSelect to Beginning
Cmd+Opt+Shift+RightSelect to End

Indentation ​

ShortcutDescription
Ctrl+IIndent
Ctrl+XShift Right
Ctrl+SShift Left
Cmd+Shift+[Move to Fold
Cmd+Shift+]Unfold

Build & Run ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+BBuild
Cmd+RBuild and Run
Cmd+Shift+BBuild with Active Target
Cmd+Shift+KClean
Cmd+.Stop
Cmd+Alt+RTest
Cmd+Alt+TProfile
Cmd+Alt+IAnalyze
Cmd+Shift+AArchive

Debug ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+Shift+ReturnToggle Debugger
Cmd+Alt+YRun to Line
F6Step Over
F7Step Into
F8Step Out
Cmd+Alt+F8Step Out All
Cmd+Shift+BToggle Breakpoint
Cmd+Alt+BEnable Breakpoint
Cmd+YActivate Breakpoint
Cmd+Opt+BAll Breakpoints

Breakpoints ​

ShortcutDescription
F6Step Over
F7Step Into
F8Step Out
Cmd+Alt+BDelete All Breakpoints
Cmd+Shift+BToggle Symbolic Breakpoint
Cmd+Opt+ClickAdd Exception Breakpoint

Assistant Editor ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+Opt+ReturnToggle Assistant
Cmd+Opt+1Counterparts
Cmd+Opt+2Preview
Cmd+Opt+3Previous/Next
Cmd+Opt+4Focused Item
Cmd+Shift+AAdd Configuration

Version Control ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+Alt+CCommit
Cmd+Alt+Shift+CPush
Cmd+Alt+PPull
Cmd+Alt+XUpdate
Cmd+Alt+ERefresh
Cmd+Alt+FShow File Compare

Snippets ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+Opt+Shift+2Code Snippet Library
Cmd+Shift+LOpen Snippet

Interface Builder ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+Shift+LOpen Snippet
Cmd+Shift+EPreview
RReset Attributes
ArrowResize
Opt+DragResize from Center
Cmd+Option+4Size to Fit

Organizer ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+Opt+OOrganizer
Cmd+Shift+3Devices
Cmd+Shift+2Applications

Instruments ​

ShortcutDescription
Cmd+Opt+ILaunch with Instruments
Cmd+IInstruments
Pager
